checklist.scoring_logic_note: Using approved beverage archetype scoring from the engine (BARI_RECAL_P0=on). No new scoring rules introduced — juices score under the existing beverage calorie table which is calibrated for per-100ml values.
checklist.label_observability_note: Sub-pool field (juice_100/nectar/fruit_drink/smoothie/cold_pressed) surfaced on every product. fruitContentPct field present where label declares it. novaGroup field present.
checklist.rollback_plan_note: Frontend JSON is a new file (juices_frontend_v1.json). No existing frozen baselines affected. Rollback = remove JSON from comparisons/ directory.
checklist.misroute_handling: Product 7290006696717 (Muscat grape juice) scored under dessert archetype. Annotated in frontend JSON as juice_100 with routing_note flag.
checklist.category_ceiling_note: No product reaches B or above except one fresh-squeezed (סחוט תפוזים). This is the expected finding: juice = high sugar, zero fiber, zero satiety = structural C ceiling for processed products.
checklist.unit_override_note: All 65 products confirmed per_100ml in nutrition_unit field. Engine beverage table is calibrated for this unit.
